narrative:
Precinct Newberry East (precinct in Miami County) has 1,076 registered voters, with 51.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 43.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 5.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 37.7 percentage points.
